name: Chocolate Chip Sour Cream Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the eggs, one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Mix in the sour cream and vanilla extract until fully combined.
4. Sift together the dry ingredients (flour, salt, baking powder, baking soda).
5. Add the sifted dry ingredients to the wet mixture gradually, stirring until just mixed.
6. Pour about half of the batter into a greased 10-inch tube pan.
7. Sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over the batter.
8. Spoon the remaining batter over the chocolate chips and sprinkle with cinnamon sugar.
9. Bake at 350°F for 40-45 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
